hero.badge: Smart Legal Practice Management for Indian Lawyers
hero.subtitle: Manage cases, analyse documents, investigate facts, and draft court filings — all from one platform built for Indian lawyers.

services.title: Platform Features
services.subtitle: Everything your law firm needs to manage cases, investigate documents, draft filings, and collaborate — powered by AI.
services.corporateLawDesc: Create and track cases in minutes. One dashboard for all your matters with complete activity history.
services.familyLawDesc: Ask questions about your case files and get instant answers with exact page references. Works in English, Hindi, and Marathi.
services.criminalDefenseDesc: Upload your documents and get a detailed investigation report — names, dates, contradictions, risks, and legal precedents found automatically.
services.estatePlanningDesc: Generate Legal Notices, Plaints, Vakalatnamas, Bail Applications, and Affidavits from templates. Refine with simple follow-up instructions.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose LawFirmAI?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Purpose-built for Indian legal professionals. We combine deep understanding of Indian litigation workflows with intelligent automation to save you time.
whyChooseUs.quote: LawFirmAI cut our case preparation time in half. The investigation engine catches things we would have missed.
whyChooseUs.integrityDesc: Templates for Vakalatnama, Plaints, Bail Applications, and more. Supports Hindi, Marathi, and English.
whyChooseUs.trackRecordDesc: Our investigation engine reads every page, spots contradictions, extracts key facts, and flags risks.
whyChooseUs.clientCentricDesc: Each case is stored separately with secure login and encryption. Your client data never leaves your account.
whyChooseUs.multiLanguageDesc: Serve clients in their preferred language with our built-in translation and transliteration tools.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Legal Professionals
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from lawyers and firms already using LawFirmAI to transform their practice.
testimonials.testimonial1: The AI investigation engine is a game-changer. It identified contradictions in a 200-page document set that we would have spent days finding manually.
testimonials.testimonial2: Document drafting with AI saves us hours every week. The Vakalatnama and Plaint templates are perfectly suited for Indian courts.
testimonials.testimonial3: Managing 50+ active cases across our firm was chaos before LawFirmAI. Now everything is in one place — documents, billing, calendar, team chat.
testimonials.testimonial3Role: Managing Partner, Patel Legal LLP, Delhi

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Legal Practice?
cta.subtitle: Join Indian lawyers using AI to work faster, miss less, and manage their practice from one platform. Start your free trial today.

footer.tagline: AI-powered legal practice management built for Indian lawyers and law firms.
footer.disclaimer: LawFirmAI is a legal practice management tool. It does not provide legal advice. All AI-generated content should be reviewed by a qualified legal professional.

aboutUs.heroSubtitle: We started LawFirmAI because Indian lawyers deserve better tools — built for how you actually work, not how Silicon Valley thinks you do.
aboutUs.missionDesc: We're a small team obsessed with one thing — giving Indian lawyers the same technological edge that big corporate firms have, without the big corporate price tag.
aboutUs.integrityDesc: No hidden fees, no lock-in contracts. We earn your trust every month, not lock you in for a year.
aboutUs.excellenceDesc: Every feature we build comes from real conversations with practicing lawyers. We don't guess what you need — we ask.
aboutUs.clientCentricDesc: When you win a case faster because our tool helped, that's our win too. We measure success by your results, not our revenue.
aboutUs.year1998Desc: Identified the gap in Indian legal tech — lawyers needed AI tools built for Indian courts, not US ones.
aboutUs.year2010Desc: Launched LawFirmAI with case management, AI investigation, and document drafting for Indian litigation.
aboutUs.year2023Desc: Expanding multilingual support, adding more document templates, and onboarding firms across India.
aboutUs.foundersSubtitle: Built by someone who saw the problem firsthand.
aboutUs.founderBio: A technologist who spent time with Indian litigation lawyers and saw how much time was lost to paperwork, scattered documents, and manual research. Built LawFirmAI to fix that.
aboutUs.ctaSubtitle: Start your free trial today. No credit card required.

platformOverview.heroSubtitle: An all-in-one AI-powered legal workspace. Case management, document intelligence, multi-agent investigation, document drafting, team collaboration, and billing — all with multilingual support for the Indian legal market.
platformOverview.whoWeAreTitle: AI-Powered Legal Practice for the Indian Market
platformOverview.whoWeAreDesc: LawFirmAI helps law firms modernize their practice by combining traditional case management with cutting-edge AI capabilities — enabling lawyers to work faster, smarter, and more collaboratively.
platformOverview.featuresSubtitle: From case creation to AI-powered investigations, we provide a comprehensive suite of tools designed for modern legal practice.

features.caseManagementDesc: 3-step guided case creation, centralized dashboard, activity logging, configurable notifications, and full audit trails across Family Law, Corporate, Real Estate, and Litigation.
features.ragChatDesc: Chat with your case documents using Retrieval-Augmented Generation. Get citation-backed answers with source verification and session management.
features.investigationDesc: 9-step multi-agent pipeline that analyzes documents, extracts entities, audits timelines, validates evidence, and generates comprehensive reports.
features.draftingDesc: Template-based generation for Legal Notices, Contracts, Affidavits, and more. Refine through conversation, with automatic RAG indexing.
features.docManagementDesc: Multi-format upload (PDF, DOCX, images, audio), OCR for scanned documents, audio transcription, bulk ZIP upload, and real-time status tracking.
features.teamCollabDesc: Create and manage your firm, invite members with role-based access, assign lead attorneys, and manage seat-based licensing.
features.messagingDesc: Socket.io-powered instant messaging with threaded conversations, contact management, friend requests, and read receipts.
features.calendarDesc: Day/Week/WorkWeek views with color-coded event types: Meetings, Court Dates, Appointments, Deadlines, and Personal events.
features.billingDesc: Case-level billing, organization dashboard, Razorpay integration, wallet balance tracking, and invoice download/print.
features.multilingualDesc: Full i18n framework with browser detection, Indic script transliteration, virtual keyboard, and multilingual RAG across English and Indian languages.

platformOverview.pipelineSubtitle: A sophisticated multi-agent system that analyzes case documents through 9 specialized AI agents, delivering comprehensive intelligence reports.

entityExtractor.title: Entity Extractor
entityExtractor.desc: Extracts people, dates, organizations, and facts

primaryInvestigator.title: Primary Investigator
primaryInvestigator.desc: Conducts deep investigation of all findings

crossExaminer.title: Cross-Examiner
crossExaminer.desc: Critiques and challenges the investigation findings

evidenceValidator.title: Evidence Validator
evidenceValidator.desc: Validates the strength and reliability of evidence

legalResearcher.title: Legal Researcher
legalResearcher.desc: Researches applicable laws and legal precedents

riskAssessor.title: Risk Assessor
riskAssessor.desc: Assesses case risks, weaknesses, and gaps

platformOverview.pipelineOutputDesc: Structured facts with confidence scores, entity maps, timeline analysis, conflict detection, risk assessment, evidence gaps, and legal issues — all delivered with real-time streaming progress.

casePreparation.title: Case Preparation
casePreparation.desc: Upload all case documents, AI indexes everything, then ask questions in natural language and get cited answers instantly.

caseInvestigation.title: Case Investigation
caseInvestigation.desc: Run the 9-agent investigation pipeline to get a structured report with facts, risks, conflicts, and legal issues in minutes.

documentDrafting.title: Document Drafting
documentDrafting.desc: Select a template, AI generates a draft using your case context, refine through conversation, then save and index.

teamCoordination.title: Team Coordination
teamCoordination.desc: Create a firm, invite attorneys, assign cases, communicate in real-time, and track all activities.

courtPreparation.title: Court Preparation
courtPreparation.desc: Schedule court dates, review document timelines, cross-examine evidence gaps, and assess risks before hearings.

clientCommunication.title: Client Communication
clientCommunication.desc: Message clients directly, share case updates, track billing, and manage appointments from one place.

multilingualPractice.title: Multilingual Practice
multilingualPractice.desc: Work seamlessly in Hindi and English, OCR vernacular documents, and chat with documents in any supported language.

security.rateLimiting: Rate limiting across all endpoints (chat: 30/min, uploads: 10/min)
security.inputSanitization: Input sanitization (XSS, SQL injection, parameter pollution protection)
security.docOwnership: Document ownership verification — lawyers only see their own case data
security.caseIsolation: Case-isolated RAG — each case's documents are strictly separated
security.passwordSecurity: Bcrypt hashing, strength validation, account lockout after 5 failed attempts
security.fileValidation: File validation: 50MB limit, extension whitelist, filename sanitization
security.encryption: HTTPS/SSL encryption for all data in transit

platformOverview.ctaTitle: Ready to Transform Your Legal Practice?
platformOverview.ctaSubtitle: LawFirmAI gives lawyers AI superpowers without leaving their case workflow. Join the future of legal practice management.
